understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate a selectable piece (and potentially switch between multiple selectables) to reach the goal tile(s) within a limited step budget, using movement and any necessary pushing to clear paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Positions were given as pixel coordinates [x,y] with movement shifting by 3 pixels per grid cell. MOVE_* attempted to move the currently selected piece one cell in that direction; if a pushable object (block) was immediately adjacent in that direction, it could be pushed along with the piece. Walls could block or otherwise affect movement, and their exact behavior might require experimentation; the movement_*_blocked flags were only hints about adjacency, not guaranteed failure. When multiple selectable pieces existed, CLICK with an exact object position switched which piece was controlled.
